name: @clearline/data-access-org-security
description: Organization Security & Compliance data-access layer for clearline-web (EPIC-CW-022 / US-CW-040): React Query hooks over /api/org-security for SSO/SAML configuration + connection test + enable, org-wide 2FA enforcement, idle-timeout, and the CIDR IP allowlist with its self-lockout guard. No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-040 Organization Security & Compliance).
